ksa_text: Develop and maintain responsible AI assessment tools, templates, and rubrics for use across the enterprise AI development lifecycle.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to identify complex root-cause analysis and recommend mitigations

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-T-008 (AI Governance/Task) scores 0.583 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.583). Scope is in_scope for Chief Medical Information Officer: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate. [AG is an exempt core domain for this role.]

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, AI Governance, composite 0.583. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI Governance for Chief Medical Information Officer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI Governance appears in approximately 85% of Chief Medical Information Officer job postings. AI governance accountability appears in >80% of CMIO JDs.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. AI Governance is market-validated for Chief Medical Information Officer. Final decision: include.
